root_cause.previous_failure: The strict N2 JANGTQ2 long-delta proof used a loopback vMLX endpoint through the panel's remote-session path. The panel pinned an explicit tool_choice for a second user turn. The vMLX Responses stream then returned tool_calls_required when the model did not produce a tool call, and the UI persisted 128 exclamation marks as visible output.
root_cause.relevant_before_fix_log: Responses API error event: tool_choice='required' was set but the model did not produce any tool calls

source_fix.behavior: Loopback remote vMLX sessions no longer pin explicit built-in tool_choice. The request still sends tools, so the model can choose tool calls normally, but the UI no longer turns a local vMLX loopback model into a strict generic remote required-tool request.

focused_panel_tests.command: cd panel && npm test -- tests/request-builder.test.ts tests/tool-auto-continue.test.ts

settings_flow_slice.command: cd panel && npm test -- tests/settings-flow.test.ts -t 'uses --is-mllm|forceTextOnly|video sampling controls'

strict_live_rerun.command: node panel/scripts/live-real-ui-model-proof.mjs with N2 JANGTQ2, Responses, built-in tools, strict APP_DELTA prompts, max_output_tokens=128, max_prompt_tokens=4096

boundary.classification: The API hard-error path is reduced, but the strict long-delta row remains red because N2 did not call the second tool and did not satisfy the requested visible markers.
boundary.other_agent_next_action: For this strict prompt, compare tool adherence under local-session mode versus loopback-remote mode and test prompt/template/tool schema pressure. Do not call the strict row green from this patch. The default N2 JANGTQ2 tool/cache/delta proof remains the green checkpoint row.
no_claims: N2 JANGTQ2 strict long-delta row is not green
